What We Do

Expert Carpentry, Every Job

01

Decks & Verandahs

Custom-built timber decks and verandahs designed for Australian conditions. Built to last decades with premium hardwood and expert craftsmanship.

02

Bathroom Renovations

Complete bathroom transformations. From luxury double vanities to frameless showers — we handle the full fitout to a flawless finish.

03

Pergolas & Lockups

Structurally sound pergolas, lockup frames and enclosures. Precise, clean and built to council standards every time.

04

Kitchen Fitouts

Custom cabinetry, benchtop installation and kitchen renovations. We bring your kitchen vision to life with meticulous attention to detail.

05

Fix Outs & Renovations

Internal and external renovations from start to finish. Qualified tradespeople managing the entire job so you don't have to.

06

Custom Carpentry

Bespoke joinery, custom cabinetry and one-of-a-kind timber work. If you can dream it, we can build it.

Why Choose Us

We Don't Just Build.
We Take Pride In It.

AW Carpentry brings something different — a team of fully qualified tradespeople who care about the result as much as you do.

🏆

Fully Qualified Tradespeople

Every job is done by qualified, licensed carpenters — no shortcuts, just proper tradespeople who know their craft.

📋

Full Job Management

We manage everything start to finish. One point of contact, zero stress, a result you'll be proud to show off.

🔨

All Aspects of Carpentry

Decks, pergolas, bathrooms, kitchens, lockups — one team, all the skills, no juggling multiple tradies.

📍

Local & Reliable

Based in Smythesdale, Ballarat. We're local, accountable, and we show up when we say we will.

★★★★★
5-Star Craftsmanship
Every project is treated like it's our own home. We don't cut corners — we cut timber, and we cut it right.
